name: Monday.com
description: Work management platform for teams. Manage boards, items, projects, and workflows with customizable workspaces.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk: Monday.com is a work management platform that helps teams plan, organize, and track work in a customizable workspace. The API uses GraphQL for flexible data queries and mutations.

tools.name: Get Boards
tools.description: Get all boards in the account with their basic information

query.default: query { boards (limit: 10) { id name description state board_kind } }

tools.name: Get Board Items
tools.description: Get items from a specific board

query.description: GraphQL query to retrieve board items. Use board_id variable to specify board.
query.default: query { boards (ids: [BOARD_ID]) { items_page (limit: 50) { cursor items { id name state } } } }

tools.name: Create Item
tools.description: Create a new item on a board

query.description: GraphQL mutation to create an item. Use board_id and item_name variables.
query.default: mutation { create_item (board_id: BOARD_ID, item_name: "New Item") { id name } }

tools.name: Update Item
tools.description: Update an existing item's name or properties

query.description: GraphQL mutation to update an item. Use item_id and new values.
query.default: mutation { change_simple_column_value (item_id: ITEM_ID, board_id: BOARD_ID, column_id: "COLUMN_ID", value: "NEW_VALUE") { id name } }

query.description: GraphQL mutation to create a board. Specify board_name and board_kind.
query.default: mutation { create_board (board_name: "New Board", board_kind: public) { id name } }

tools.name: Get Users
tools.description: Get all users in the account

query.default: query { users { id name email title photo_thumb } }

tools.name: Get Workspaces
tools.description: Get all workspaces in the account

query.default: query { workspaces { id name kind description } }

tools.name: Search Items by Column Value
tools.description: Search for items based on column values

query.description: GraphQL query to search items by column values. Use board_id, column_id, and column_value.
query.default: query { items_page_by_column_values (board_id: BOARD_ID, columns: [{column_id: "COLUMN_ID", column_values: ["VALUE"]}]) { cursor items { id name } } }

tools.name: Delete Item
tools.description: Delete an item from a board

query.description: GraphQL mutation to delete an item. Use item_id.

tools.name: Custom Query
tools.description: Execute a custom GraphQL query or mutation

query.description: Custom GraphQL query or mutation to execute
